title: InstanceList
description: InstanceList schema from AWS IAM Identity Center

allOf.description: The ARN of the IAM Identity Center instance under which the operation will be executed. For more information about ARNs, see Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) and AWS Service Namespaces in the AWS General Reference.
The identifier of the identity store that is connected to the IAM Identity Center instance.

items.description: Provides information about the IAM Identity Center instance.
